summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TrendScout SaaS application. All 14 core features and flows tested successfully including landing page, login flow, dashboard, discover page, product details, admin panel, automation center, trend alerts, and logout functionality. App runs fully in Demo Mode using localStorage.

issues: Console warnings: Recharts width/height warnings during initial render - minor cosmetic issue, charts render correctly after layout stabilizes

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, 'Start Free Trial' CTA, and 'See How It Works' button
Login page displays Demo Mode banner and accepts any email/password credentials
Auth flow successfully redirects to dashboard after demo login
Dashboard displays all 4 stat cards (Total Products: 10, Avg Trend Score: 75, High Opportunity: 5, Rising Trends: 4)
Dashboard shows Area chart (Trend Activity) with proper data visualization
Dashboard shows Pie chart (Category Distribution) with category breakdown
Dashboard displays Top Trending Products list with trend scores and badges
Sidebar navigation shows Elite section with Trend Alerts link
Sidebar shows Admin section with Admin Panel and Automation links
Discover page loads with 10 product cards and all 6 filter controls (search, category, trend stage, opportunity, sort by, sort order)
Product detail page displays full product info, pricing details, AI Analysis, and Save Product button
Admin Panel loads with Products, Users, Subscriptions tabs all working correctly
Admin Automation Center displays 4 Quick Action cards (Run Scoring, AI Summaries, Generate Alerts, Import Products)
Automation Center has 3 tabs (Import Products, Manual Entry, Automation Pipeline)
Generate Alerts quick action successfully creates 5 new alerts
Trend Alerts page displays generated alerts with proper stats cards (Total: 5, Unread: 5, Critical: 1, Early Stage: 1)
Alert cards show View and Dismiss action buttons - both functional
Alert filter dropdown and Mark All Read button are visible and functional
Sidebar shows unread alert badge count (5) on Trend Alerts nav item
Logout button successfully logs out user and redirects to landing page
Demo Mode indicator visible in sidebar footer
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts console warnings about width/height during initial render - not blocking, charts render correctly
All data-testid attributes properly implemented across components for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - Mock data defined in productService.js with 10 products
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working in Demo Mode. localStorage handles all data persistence (products, alerts). Generate Alerts action creates alerts based on high-opportunity products. Previous test iteration (iteration_2) already validated automation features thoroughly.

mocked_apis_used.Supabase Auth: MOCKED in AuthContext.jsx using DEMO_USER and DEMO_PROFILE constants
mocked_apis_used.Supabase Database: MOCKED using localStorage in productService.js and alertService.js
mocked_apis_used.Products CRUD: MOCKED with MOCK_PRODUCTS array in productService.js
mocked_apis_used.Alerts CRUD: MOCKED with localStorage key 'trendscout_alerts' in alertService.js
